createByDuration.description: Create a time entry via duration

createByStartEnd.displayName: Create via Start and End Time
createByStartEnd.description: Create a time entry via start and end time

deleteExternal.description: Delete a time entry’s external reference

accountId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

is_active.description: Whether to only return active users and false to return inactive users

updated_since.description: Only return users belonging to the user with the given ID

client_id.description: Only return time entries belonging to the client with the given ID

from.description: Only return time entries with a spent_date on or after the given date

state.description: Only return invoices with a state matching the value provided. Options: draft, open, paid, or closed.

to.description: Only return time entries with a spent_date on or before the given date

page.description: The page number to use in pagination

is_billed.description: Whether to only return time entries that have been invoiced and false to return time entries that have not been invoiced

project_id.description: Only return time entries belonging to the client with the given ID

user_id.description: Only return time entries belonging to the user with the given ID

is_running.description: Whether to only return running time entries and false to return non-running time entries

id.description: The ID of the time entry to update

address.description: A textual representation of the client’s physical address. May include new line characters.

currency.description: The currency used by the invoice. If not provided, the client’s currency will be used. See a list of supported currencies

is_active.description: Whether the user is active or archived

last_name.description: The last name of the contact

over_budget_notification_percentage.description: Percentage value used to trigger over budget email alerts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

issue_date.description: Date the invoice was issued. Defaults to today’s date.

notes.description: These are notes about the time entry

number.description: If no value is set, the number will be automatically generated

tax.description: This percentage is applied to the subtotal, including line items and discounts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

tax2.description: This percentage is applied to the subtotal, including line items and discounts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

billable.description: Whether this expense is billable or not. Defaults to true.

total_cost.description: The total amount of the expense

units.description: The quantity of units to use in calculating the total_cost of the expense

user_id.description: The ID of the user to associate with the time entry. Defaults to the currently authenticated user’s ID.

estimate_id.description: The ID of the estimate associated with this invoice

payment_term.description: The timeframe in which the invoice should be paid. Defaults to custom. Options: upon receipt, net 15, net 30, net 45, or net 60.

retainer_id.description: The ID of the retainer associated with this invoice

budget.description: The budget in hours for the project when budgeting by time

budget_is_monthly.description: Whether the budget resets every month. Defaults to false.

cost_budget.description: The monetary budget for the project when budgeting by money

cost_budget_include_expenses.description: Option for budget of Total Project Fees projects to include tracked expenses. Defaults to false.

fee.description: The amount you plan to invoice for the project. Only used by fixed-fee projects.

hourly_rate.description: Rate for projects billed by Project Hourly Rate

is_fixed_fee.description: Whether the project is a fixed-fee project or not

notify_when_over_budget.description: Whether project managers should be notified when the project goes over budget. Defaults to false.

show_budget_to_all.description: Whether to show project budget to all employees. Does not apply to Total Project Fee projects. Defaults to false.

billable_by_default.description: Whether default tasks should be marked billable when creating a new project. Defaults to true.

default_hourly_rate.description: The billable rate to use for this user when they are added to a project

is_default.description: Whether this task should be automatically added to future projects. Defaults to false.

hours.description: The current amount of time tracked

started_time.description: The time the entry started. Defaults to the current time. Example: “8:00am”.

can_create_invoices.description: Whether the user can create invoices. Only applicable to Project Managers.

can_create_projects.description: Whether the user can create projects. Only applicable to Project Managers.

can_see_rates.description: Whether the user can see billable rates on projects. Only applicable to Project Managers.

cost_rate.description: The cost rate to use for this user when calculating a project’s costs vs billable amount

has_access_to_all_future_projects.displayName: Has Access To All Future Projects
has_access_to_all_future_projects.description: Whether the user should be automatically added to future projects

is_admin.description: Whether the user has Admin permissions

is_contractor.description: Whether the user is a contractor or an employee

is_project_manager.description: Whether the user has Project Manager permissions

roles.description: The role names assigned to this person

timezone.description: The user’s timezone. Defaults to the company’s timezone. See a list of supported time zones.

weekly_capacity.description: The number of hours per week this person is available to work in seconds. Defaults to 126000 seconds (35 hours).

address.description: A textual representation of the client’s physical address. May include new line characters.

currency.description: The currency used by the invoice. If not provided, the client’s currency will be used. See a list of supported currencies

is_active.description: Whether the user is active or archived

client_id.description: The ID of the client to associate this project with

over_budget_notification_percentage.description: Percentage value used to trigger over budget email alerts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

issue_date.description: Date the invoice was issued. Defaults to today’s date.

number.description: If no value is set, the number will be automatically generated

notes.description: These are notes about the time entry

tax.description: This percentage is applied to the subtotal, including line items and discounts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

tax2.description: This percentage is applied to the subtotal, including line items and discounts. Example: use 10.0 for 10.0%.

billable.description: Whether this expense is billable or not. Defaults to true.

expense_category_id.description: The ID of the expense category this expense is being tracked against

project_id.description: The ID of the project associated with this expense

total_cost.description: The total amount of the expense

units.description: The quantity of units to use in calculating the total_cost of the expense

user_id.description: The ID of the user associated with this expense. Defaults to the ID of the currently authenticated user.

estimate_id.description: The ID of the estimate associated with this invoice

payment_term.description: The timeframe in which the invoice should be paid. Defaults to custom. Options: upon receipt, net 15, net 30, net 45, or net 60.

retainer_id.description: The ID of the retainer associated with this invoice

bill_by.description: The method by which the project is invoiced

budget.description: The budget in hours for the project when budgeting by time

budget_by.description: The email of the user or "none"

budget_is_monthly.description: Whether to have the budget reset every month. Defaults to false.

cost_budget.description: The monetary budget for the project when budgeting by money

cost_budget_include_expenses.description: Option for budget of Total Project Fees projects to include tracked expenses. Defaults to false.

fee.description: The amount you plan to invoice for the project. Only used by fixed-fee projects.

hourly_rate.description: Rate for projects billed by Project Hourly Rate

is_billable.description: Whether the project is billable or not

is_fixed_fee.description: Whether the project is a fixed-fee project or not

notify_when_over_budget.description: Whether project managers should be notified when the project goes over budget. Defaults to false.

show_budget_to_all.description: Whether to show project budget to all employees. Does not apply to Total Project Fee projects. Defaults to false.

billable_by_default.description: Whether default tasks should be marked billable when creating a new project. Defaults to true.

default_hourly_rate.description: The billable rate to use for this user when they are added to a project

is_default.description: Whether this task should be automatically added to future projects. Defaults to false.

hours.description: The current amount of time tracked

started_time.description: The time the entry started. Defaults to the current time. Example: “8:00am”.

can_create_invoices.description: Whether the user can create invoices. Only applicable to Project Managers.

can_create_projects.description: Whether the user can create projects. Only applicable to Project Managers.

can_see_rates.description: Whether the user can see billable rates on projects. Only applicable to Project Managers.

cost_rate.description: The cost rate to use for this user when calculating a project’s costs vs billable amount

has_access_to_all_future_projects.displayName: Has Access To All Future Projects
has_access_to_all_future_projects.description: Whether the user should be automatically added to future projects

is_admin.description: Whether the user has Admin permissions

is_contractor.description: Whether the user is a contractor or an employee

is_project_manager.description: Whether the user has Project Manager permissions

roles.description: The role names assigned to this person

timezone.description: The user’s timezone. Defaults to the company’s timezone. See a list of supported time zones.

weekly_capacity.description: The number of hours per week this person is available to work in seconds. Defaults to 126000 seconds (35 hours).

firstName.description: The first name of the user

clientId.description: The ID of the client to associate this project with

projectId.description: The ID of the project to associate with the time entry

expenseCategoryId.description: The ID of the expense category this expense is being tracked against

spentDate.description: The ISO 8601 formatted date the time entry was spent

isBillable.description: Whether the project is billable or not

billBy.description: The method by which the project is invoiced

budgetBy.description: The email of the user or "none"

taskId.description: The ID of the task to associate with the time entry

lastName.description: The last name of the user
